title: Paler Oak Wood
description: Makes the pale oak wood paler like its meant to be!
body:
![Pale Oak Planks divided by resourcepack and vanilla versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aec8003ec3d2ae75a42f449221b87036321dae76.png)This pack desaturates pale oak by 70% so it makes pale oak more white.
I hope this pack makes your builds better, Enjoy!
